parameters.subject: n8n Account Migration Completed
parameters.text:
Hello,

Your n8n workflows have been successfully migrated from {{$node["Initialize Migration"].json["sourceAccount"]["email"]}} to {{$node["Initialize Migration"].json["targetAccount"]["email"]}}.

Migration Details:
- Started: {{$node["Initialize Migration"].json["timestamp"]}}
- Workflows transferred: {{$node["Process Workflows"].json.length}}
- Status: Completed successfully

Please verify that all workflows are working correctly in your new account.

Best regards,
n8n Automation System
